name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: PETITION: Pro-Life Values
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
We need to stand up. PeterI will **always** fight for the unborn children who can't defend themselves.But the radical anti-life liberals have been waiting for this moment for decades - when they've got pro-abortion majorities in Congress and a White House terrified to stand up to them.There's ONE way to make sure we stop them: TAKING BACK THE MAJORITY in Congress! We're only **_five seats away_ **from winning the majority back in 2022, and every single contribution you make and petition you sign, will help put us on the road to doing just that! **62 million children have been deprived of their right to life since Roe v. Wade. [Will you ADD YOUR NAME to fight for pro-life values in Congress?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-r/)** [[ SIGN HERE ] - Defend the Right to Life](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-y/) In my first few months in Congress, I proudly put [action](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-j/) behind my promise to [defend the rights of the unborn](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-t/).
* I joined my Republican colleagues in reaffirming my commitment to the Hyde Amendment.
* I demanded that Joe Biden reverse his decision to allow your tax dollars to pay for abortions overseas.
* I supported a bill that requires medical care for children who survive abortions, and criminal penalties for anyone who fails to provide it.

Unfortunately, **we know the attacks on life are just beginning. **The radical liberals in Congress have _already_ launched all-out assaults on:
* The Second Amendment
* The Supreme Court
* The Integrity of our Elections
* Small Businesses
* Business taxes
* Police
* Our Energy Industry
* Border Security
* Our Schoolchildren
* Numerous Republicans they're trying to "cancel"
* Bipartisanship
* The Filibuster
* _and the list goes on and on!_

Just last week, the liberals' official bill to PACK THE COURT bill became real. **YOU CAN BE SURE THAT THEIR FOUR ADDITIONAL JUSTICES WILL ALL BE PRO-ABORTION! ****[This is OUR way of standing up and fighting back.](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-i/)****[Please, will you add your name immediately to your friends, family, and neighbors, to back the right to life?](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-d/)** -Congressman Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-h/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-k/) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
P.O. Box 5048, Elm Grove, WI 53122 [Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-mdijlg-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-u) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-mdijlg-ahkdjtlkr-o/)

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: WANTED: A Few Patriotic Troublemakers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "Trouble Maker") Peter, Since I got to Washington, I have been called more names than I can remember hearing on my grade school playground. All of it is the bully's way of saying the same thing: I don't like you. Let's face facts: they are scared of me because I am standing in their way. **_I 'm standing in the way_** when they try to redefine gender and question the Bible. **_I 'm standing in the way_** when they try to defund the police in your town. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER")**_I 'm standing in the way_** when they try to take away your guns. **_I 'm standing in the way_** when they try to pack the courts so they can get their way when their liberal policies can't get enough votes in Congress. **I 'm standing in the way of them throwing the Constitution out the window and controlling your life from womb to tomb.** **[Will you stand with this troublemaker and help me fight them with everything I have? Donate $35, $50, $100 or more, and let's put an end to liberal tyranny!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "Will
you stand with this troublemaker and help me fight them with everything I have? Donate $35, $50, $100 or more, and let’s put an end to liberal
tyranny!")** I refuse to play their games by their rules. I'm here to uphold the Constitution and serve the people, not the corporate interests that fund the swamp. **COVID-19 gave many of these bullies just the excuse they needed to start taking over your life, all in the name of "public safety." I saw it for what it was, a power grab.** Now, they are doing the same thing with their plan to pack the court with liberal justices--just enough to swing every decision farther and farther to the left. **If they win, nobody will be able to stand in their way again.** But today, I am standing in their way, holding them accountable for policies that embrace socialism over freedom and demonstrating how they are just as immature as the kids I remember from the elementary playground when you question them--just like AOC's refusal to debate me on her Green New Deal policies. They know I am going to be a problem, and that's why Nancy Pelosi, her goons and their friends in the liberal media have been targeting me. I need to be able to fight back, to fight for you. **[If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to
rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.")** Together, we can stop the progressive madness that has overtaken Washington, but we need to start today, and I need you by my side! God Bless America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Please remember that the same people who applaud when Antifa and BLM burn American cities are the same people coming after me. **[If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213679:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000
TODAY!")** | | [STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57213678:6349yxupN:m:1:3103520637:761772A2C44F14947448C9A59E282749:r "STAND WITH A
TROUBLEMAKER")

| | Derek,

We've all seen the headlines about Republican state legislatures passing outrageous voter suppression laws that roll back mail-in voting and even make it a crime to hand out water bottles at polling places. But while other states are attacking the right to vote, Virginia is leading the way with new laws expanding access to the ballot box.

Some folks forget that just a few years ago, Virginia was a hotbed of restrictive voting laws and illegal gerrymandering. Thankfully, we turned things around by flipping the General Assembly blue and electing Democrats who have championed the right to vote.

**[With control of Virginia's House of Delegates on the line, that progress is on the ballot this November. So I'm personally asking you to make a contribution and join me in supporting the Virginia House Democrats. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: VOTE HAPPENING TODAY – Tell your Senator to say no to earmarks!
body:
| |
---
We need to buck up the following U.S. Senators and urge them to oppose bringing back earmarks. (If you already called/tweeted yesterday, please do it again. We have an updated message and want to send it to more Senators.)
**There is a vote this afternoon in the Republican conference on whether or not to allow earmarks to return.**

Earmarks may seem unimportant or arcane, but if they are brought back, the left may use them to buy off support for one of their awful, radical bills, like the Corrupt Politicians Act, or statehood for D.C., or packing the Supreme Court, and so on.
**Please call and tweet the Senator(s) listed below and urge them to vote against bringing back earmarks and to make a public statement opposing earmarks.**
_The Tweets are super simple! Just ensure you are logged into Twitter, then click the link, and click the “Tweet” button to send the tweet._
**Dan Sullivan (AK)**
202-224-3004
[TWEET](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTExLTBhZjBlOGFiMzNhZTRmMGE5MTRjY2M2MDYwZTdiOGUw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9pbnRlbnQvdHdlZXQ_&K=NFQqiwW8iYRot_JgN5K5MA)

clean_body: | | We need to buck up the following U.S. Senators and urge them to oppose bringing back earmarks. (If you already called/tweeted yesterday, please do it again. We have an updated message and want to send it to more Senators.) There is a vote this afternoon in the Republican conference on whether or not to allow earmarks to return. Earmarks may seem unimportant or arcane, but if they are brought back, the left may use them to buy off support for one of their awful, radical bills, like the Corrupt Politicians Act, or statehood for D.C., or packing the Supreme Court, and so on. Please call and tweet the Senator(s) listed below and urge them to vote against bringing back earmarks and to make a public statement opposing earmarks. The Tweets are super simple! Just ensure you are logged into Twitter, then click the link, and click the “Tweet” button to send the tweet. Dan Sullivan (AK) 202-224-3004 Tommy Tuberville (AL) 202-224-4124 Tom Cotton (AR) 202-224-2353 Todd Young (IN) 202-224-5623 Cindy Hyde-Smith (MS) 202-224-5054 Richard Burr (NC) 202-224-3154 Thom Tillis (NC) 202-224-6342 Kevin Cramer (ND) 202-224-2043 James Lankford (OK) 202-224-5754 Tim Scott (SC) 202-224-6121 Mike Rounds (SD) 202-224-5842 John Thune (SD) 202-224-2321 Bill Hagerty (TN) 202-224-4944 Marsha Blackburn (TN) 202-224-3344 John Barrasso (WY) 202-224-6441 Again, the most important thing to ask for today is that each Senator votes against earmarks. Thank you! Jenny Beth | Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need to hear from you by April 28th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We need to hear from you by April 28th as to whether or not you'll be a part of our 2022 comeback team. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)
---
**FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION:** A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress next November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

**[We're still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we've set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)
Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn't fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don't do anything dumb. Democrats haven't gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they're acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don't remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They've added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just two months and they're eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)
That's a mistake.

I'm writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)**.

While the election may not be this month or even this year - **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our "2022 comeback team"](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress next November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We're still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we've set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Wednesday, April 28th**.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)

Retiring Nancy Pelosi as Speaker and uniting all Conservatives to stop radical legislation from Joe Biden and the far left begins today. **[We're counting on you to join our cause.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)**

Without control of the House or the Senate, Republicans are inherently at a disadvantage. Right now, we can't block Democrats' pet projects from making their way into COVID relief legislation or stop Biden from halting construction on the Keystone Pipeline.

The American people made it clear in November's election - they elected Conservatives in nearly every close House race in the country. **[Now we must expand the map and take back the majority](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)**.

We hope you will be among the first to sign up and signal your commitment to return a Conservative majority in the House.

Thank you for your support.

For freedom,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57889127:WWv_pudNL:m:1:2247059263:788ED26D003E2EC0F669D26B8B88C9ED:r)
Jim Jordan

| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

PO BOX 355
Delaware, OH 43015
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 25, 2020.

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Join me on Pelosi’s list of Troublemakers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
Since I got to Washington, I have been called more names than I can remember hearing on my grade school playground. All of it is the bully's way of saying the same thing: I don't like you.
---
Since I got to Washington, I have been called more names than I can remember hearing on my grade school playground. All of it is the bully’s way of saying the same thing: I don’t like you.
| | | [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/FXNVX5Ch6A3oYK5MlOs1INlnuS-8PHzihUYz0-GiL9wTrO3swTGEK_lwZ86tB03kPokP6hMPLxTShCyTPdrFUEd-u3MCwbduK66LcTQjddb-ttp065qIVEqdG_FeLfMNP8rWpPRzVaBdyhEmDjeonY8zVeV_QwJx2lXpjuc6vCJpMcBaWix8I72Yv3J8MD866ZfY3iLsLrCdEM8XcKDFgQ) | | Please read the message below from our sponsor, Greene for Congress.
**We encourage you to[visit their site today](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/CIE8-w-fRFJ6h1iUzQMCEvajCdr9h0hg6LfYVpfmzTpgOimvOXRVfW6Mar5fTBYyRd8tnWd30V-R8t5f_-n_z69b1nS9yW6lOHaDZQ3xWcENgpUSrSeOqLseR2MpBa09tr_dZZyQonYXgmYr4lyxAx0TNleLMPNeDW1QpvMc64nRAOiZNvZKzktHRrI7IE70l3sgGDofMyOgxurlnB7VkA)**.
---
---
| [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/FJ6teDYurOo26WJJjtjEM58mgUYwBmOLNL1eUvxZ9QYIS1kEgm1uNm2rSUQP7Z3Pf6mIhik5nb3tiJM17dYceVIUItZUDVhAgYdQKTzxRpWrEEgnrgdSdGFFT7ReUgcU8h-DiKHmGfhPFvjBmEauJT55FQmKTHMOZa8M1fKnZE64EcWmrMookcLx5psS06jZqTGJ0v62hIzs1j2EJUrmEg "Trouble Maker") Fellow Patriot Since I got to Washington, I have been called more names than I can remember hearing on my grade school playground. All of it is the bully’s way of saying the same thing: I don’t like you. Let’s face facts: they are scared of me because I am standing in their way. **_I’m standing in the way_** when they try to redefine gender and question the Bible. **_I’m standing in the way_** when they try to defund the police in your town. [](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/v7JDNMeXP86DwdjCdjVvDMq3rR5e1Gov2HQ3tin7Y2Z4r6ivq7-3iTzTFG9KZFXQWwOYTohhGrgJCJixD2YjxxYjsQ3yTBo_DFfaqvSFkipLyN9AGQq1bZkL2JmQGVjFaWDSxCD91yZaO8r4H4-aJ1tuMqAXC4c9-6v9cLyltbNq5MfH1FOx2XwyG85bDwUJJEzq8_Tewb_975wag_GdFA "STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER")**_I’m standing in the way_** when they try to take away your guns. **_I’m standing in the way_** when they try to pack the courts so they can get their way when their liberal policies can’t get enough votes in Congress. **I’m standing in the way of them throwing the Constitution out the window and controlling your life from womb to tomb.** **[Will you stand with this troublemaker and help me fight them with everything I have? Donate $35, $50, $100 or more, and let’s put an end to liberal tyranny!](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/avgxDXlJWjqQf6URwsCMXmJt-0CRoU9RkGsULBxSAY-b4JjQ1_Ot4lO2XkVQCeVVcVXBfD2LRHxdWEonp1NHqOLv6HppVfBbwFRVCyJDTLNqBtC2E9CuBpcWWVQ2uhNi2E5rpwjUljnQ_RSoPCA7L_YeOwDKmtQVYvtyubML-lP79JYTtNHSxLKAN-lZmh1zhIfddqZBkKSGM762e7tdYg "Will you stand with this troublemaker and help me fight them with everything I have? Donate $35, $50, $100 or more, and let’s put an end to liberal tyranny!")** I refuse to play their games by their rules. I’m here to uphold the Constitution and serve the people, not the corporate interests that fund the swamp. **COVID-19 gave many of these bullies just the excuse they needed to start taking over your life, all in the name of “public safety.” I saw it for what it was, a power grab.** Now, they are doing the same thing with their plan to pack the court with liberal justices—just enough to swing every decision farther and farther to the left. **If they win, nobody will be able to stand in their way again.** But today, I am standing in their way, holding them accountable for policies that embrace socialism over freedom and demonstrating how they are just as immature as the kids I remember from the elementary playground when you question them—just like AOC’s refusal to debate me on her Green New Deal policies. They know I am going to be a problem, and that’s why Nancy Pelosi, her goons and their friends in the liberal media have been targeting me. I need to be able to fight back, to fight for you. **[If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/0ZC9Or68hWqdR1JXKOt-fNDON7UyH4Pd6o8eP3yUMqx_2yMN69kEoQNQzHnjor1ltKkroGbA0J0xTfCcSFcRtMpxM9NJF-jZG_fzHUM4X8HsR-TgQo735Vr4tlDzFzlxkcTwv2eBNrAzxTGGh74-ATSo6IgRKH6Ol9r413C1tw196AGd2UpHrAn_oTGR0CworWSvzd60OOOv_6f0nlO_9Q "If you love this nation and refuse to permit the radical left to rule this nation, then I need you to continue to support my efforts in our fight for freedom.")** Together, we can stop the progressive madness that has overtaken Washington, but we need to start today, and I need you by my side! God Bless America,
[](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/VDXCkpwkh0htwVB2qfKg3RZOmWDOTGcDlVxJsBpjZaFw1tu8Yphvjb_TirRB-z1CPwyajBeAy5tGmrxy8L9mqkjrOyZviqqR7tJetl4fN5H9preD2M2qpp0OZIxjSPFdyLTIKQSdoaKUHrrs5voBhyBSic0uqtSstHfFo9KXmO8VWjlhyHPBjT4acJ-pG64mJyfQWDeAMGDXHs18LxjGfA "Marjorie Taylor Greene")
Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA) P.S. Please remember that the same people who applaud when Antifa and BLM burn American cities are the same people coming after me. **[If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/JV06CtwAfKRDxOS0Ftm-zHneLwZTYZam0L-Lgy2vnlfWBH9K5LZOvV1gt2U8KBoNUO_RqaGmk4T8-cCYG9FqZhGimykf36I9mC3Ze5VIJNuhfHG7NnzY3GylSq-vIzdzkp9ZsqXpsg8zD0h8EVae68Ekk2zY_3Z9TfXr8yIhRjdKT55tv7g6SiofyoPNLuIC_XH500dODYu1qRjaedD_iHQPYnkqcu3-cyVa4IvWtMc "If you can see the writing on the wall, then join me in the fight to protect our Constitutional with a gift of $50, $100, or even $1,000 TODAY!")** | | [STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER](https://63tqh.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/b9ecGrPdcC4zMm5mRyFUymehksiqfSMA9zGXWcgg8eWh5xx0SGICt2KZljkMBJlK4wqwG05mFSafiYKPbz4hZwAVWEwOV1x2Lng55Gi9eHHe87lW7NitC-nmo3wHkoj2-aqhcw1XAaqtQWd9eQTmsveE7k4iQ5ZSrzR3vpl0EnKLcSDzNlxFSROhSnusQ5pVKcm2oOwlNVX0I1hk1f9-rA "STAND WITH A TROUBLEMAKER")
---
| **PAID FOR BY GREENE FOR CONGRESS INC.**

clean_body: [] Peter, THERE ARE SOME TICKETS LEFT! Tomorrow, we’re kicking off our Build Back Blue initiative to take back the state legislature and defeat Bill Lee, and you’re invited. This is our first major event of the initiative and will feature speakers from across the state, musical performances, branding reveal, and a question and answer session with TNDP staff. We’ll also premiere our first Build Back Blue digital ads and launch our merchandise store. We cannot build back blue without you and your support. Purchase your ticket or sponsorship now! subject: Less than 4 weeks until Primary Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court
body:
Dear Friend,

**We are less than 30 days away from the May 18th primary and we need your help to get over the finish line.**

Judge Lori Dumas is a proven jurist who would bring 19 years of experience to Pennsylvania’s Commonwealth Court.

As a national leader in trauma responsive services and the creator of the First Judicial District’s victim centered Juvenile Human Trafficking Court, Judge Dumas is a strong advocate for protecting Pennsylvania’s most vulnerable citizens, and always putting Pennsylvanians first.

[Can you chip in $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can give today to help the Friends of Judge Dumas for Commonwealth Court?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27999238/281848269/1565234157?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjIvMS84OTM4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4NzRiZi1jNWEyLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gVN1IOFjBV4eQRdUlwY96O9apTXuqPaBDmjxKXrRfyo=&emci=9cec896b-c2a2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=521874bf-c5a2-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=1353776)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I knew this would happen...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
%%=v(@sFirstName)=%%, Guess what is happening now?
|
---
| | |
Friend,

Guess what is happening now?

**I 'm being attacked for accepting President Trump's endorsement! We knew these attacks would come, but we did not expect them to come this early.**

I am incredibly humbled and proud to have received President Trump's endorsement. He oversaw a great economy, made the border the safest it's been in decades, beat back ISIS, stood up to China, and thinks I am the right man for the job to represent Florida in the US Senate!

Yet, outside groups continue to run smear campaigns just like they did to President Trump in an attempt to tear down everything we achieved together!

This is why it is **SO VITAL** that you help fight back against these lies, Friend. I cannot do this without you. We need to unite against these baseless attacks and correct the record. Unfortunately, that costs money.

_**[Can I count on you to chip in $25 to my Advertising Fund to ensure that we can fight back against these groups when they run attack ads against me for supporting President Trump?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vYN7phj2ZSyn0g-6R48UHjV8IUQ8V0If8_V2EAIQw_52eU5FbMocTv4loAZsbET5s_-LtXHzFZTS10VHYPg3po9tc8ra4L3Up8yaNj2ISTdcUbLZkNvU8c1eYI5SEj96yKbKKymlCK2QM_yDK6tckOwrhIp97-v_ryaEPDaB2i9A21Kg9uVd9PMAx1Y0IsZZpPWktvt0qOCGT7S2BD32LrgFOU458dGVHvWukYcJEbsYR9ovz_M9AN-513sSRatJo9RJ924iTTV8-iYC_rOqp7laBpHdaPbGcgHS2YHBvwFa7stY_JbW4FqP3vOz4Toz2t-F-Z107CM6F3UUv0v-74SS5mUVqlFS5Jms4eorYOWTN3pqa_ZtrEjDewOZMxWcm0VrpiQfIkPdIdgbLQwxhLeRt56o1rXB6LeXHwAqV9n85NIb9ksUY-8Y-TqJCLIP&c=nIoQXE7QhKuL6i89r-OXdMEvC_9OvyHGWLEYvOu01vwCHI48NaS3gA==&ch=khxEASxBsQD0Inz5jcyYCjfIFrfr8PrMRkAun0V7XGu4FRqndF8ymA== "Can I count on you to chip in $25 to my Advertising Fund to ensure that we can fight back against these groups when they run attack ads against me for supporting President Trump? I need you on my team, Friend. Don't let them cancel me before the real fight has even started.

Thank you,
Marco Rubio

body:
I'm sending this urgent email because our borders are at a BREAKING POINT and the Radical Left is adding insult to injury.
If you would prefer not to receive future emails, [visit here.](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5hbWVyaWNhc25ld3NsZXR0ZXIuY29tL3U%2faWQ9MjI0NzE3NzczLjhkZjc4NzE1ODQwOGE3NzA4OTMwYWNmMTRjZjJjYTljJm49VCZsPWEtbWFzdGVybGlzdF9yaWdodC1wYXRoXzEwMTQ5OSZvPTk0NDUxMzQ%3d&x=1a2c1466)
Hello Friend,
I'm sending this urgent email because our borders are at a BREAKING POINT and the Radical Left is adding insult to injury.
**First** \-- Democrats promised direct payments and free healthcare for people in the country illegally.
**Then** \-- Biden stopped Wall construction and reinstituted catch and release.
**Now** \-- Taxpayers are footing the bill for expensive hotel rooms for people in the country illegally, and border arrests are hitting record-highs!
This is not only insulting, it's dangerous. We could give up and let the open-border Democrats have their way...
[**Or we can fight back, secure our border, and protect America!**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/198483/2/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=40b4a35e)
We need The Wall. If you agree, rush resources to fight for it.
**ALL PRO-WALL CONTRIBUTIONS ARE BEING 5X-MATCHED FOR 1 HOUR:**
**[PROTECT AMERICA -> RUSH $250](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/198484/3/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=9fc06ad3)**
**[PROTECT AMERICA -> RUSH $100 ](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/198485/4/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=104f3d9c)**
**[PROTECT AMERICA -> RUSH $35](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/198483/5/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=a53a988d)**
President Trump and Conservatives took the first bold steps to build The Wall and secure our borders **\-- now it's up to all of us to follow through.**
If every Pro-Wall Patriot steps up right now, the pressure on Joe Biden and his open-border cronies will be IMPOSSIBLE to ignore. [**And on top of that, your contribution will have 5X the impact for the next HOUR.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9445134/224717773/198483/6/?ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ff2f3d13=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=bbf0f390)
Onward,
Newt Gingrich

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Fighting For the Rule of Law
body:
Judicial Watch continues to be very effective in our mission of standing firm for the rule of the law and going after corrupt politicians.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I'll be short and direct....
...Judicial Watch _continues to be very effective_ in our mission of standing firm for the rule of the law and going after corrupt politicians.
And with your **_[generous support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53479&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjExNDMwMTE=)_** , I promise to continue to fight hard on issues you care most about like the following:
* Our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) document requests and looming lawsuits to learn whether Biden executive orders to dismantle Trump immigration regulations and open our borders (which have directly resulted in an unprecedented new crisis of illegal aliens, including "unaccompanied minors" flooding over the Mexican border), exceeded the president's constitutional authority and creating a huge health and humanitarian crisis.
* Our highly successful mission to keep elections honest and help reduce the incidence of voter fraud by compelling states to comply with federal law to take reasonable steps to keep their voting rolls accurate. We are currently suing Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina and Pennsylvania following successful lawsuits in several other states.

* Our ongoing FOIA document requests and litigation to get to all the facts about Biden family influence-peddling schemes that span from Ukraine to China.

* _Our historic lawsuit continues against the city of San Francisco and Santa Clara County, California, over their deadly "sanctuary" policies_. They take on critical "precedential" importance today as liberal mayors and governors now operate more than 500 sanctuary counties, cities and states across America; and the Biden administration attempts to gut our laws against illegal immigration.

As far as I'm concerned, _we can 't ever do enough_ to fight for the rule of law and honest and open government. When it comes to using the courts to support the rule of law and government transparency, Judicial Watch is still the "only game in town."
That's why your **_[best donation today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53479&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjExNDMwMTE=)_** is so important.
Personally, I can't think of a time in our twenty-seven-year history that a strong Judicial Watch has been more important to our nation. I am extremely grateful for your **_[generous support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53479&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjExNDMwMTE=)_** of our mission.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53479&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjExNDMwMTE=)

body:
Do you want to help Trump get more Republicans in office in 2022?

****
**" Democrats have horrible policy... no borders, defund the police, sanctuary cities... thank goodness for Republicans!" -President Trump**

We second that, President Trump!

Did you hear what President Trump said on Hannity? He's seriously worried that Biden is letting our country be DESTROYED with his _**weak**_ policies. Other countries don't take us seriously anymore, and our domestic policies are being overturned by Socialists.

body:
Joe Biden is rapidly approaching his first 100 days in office and so far, we've seen the DESTRUCTION his time in office has brought upon our nation.

_****_
_****_**" I stand before you this evening filled with confidence that in 2022, we are going to take back the House and we are going to reclaim the Senate" - President Donald J. Trump**

It was almost six years ago that President Trump first announced his intention to run for President of the United States.

**President Trump revolutionized American politics, turning the tables on centuries-long career-politician control of Washington D.C.** But I'm sure you need no reminder of the good President Trump accomplished.
_****_

---

But since Democrats took control, **they have refilled the swamp and made it easier for Democrats to maintain their grip on power.**

**[**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00130caINoCDAfhznk_yYXgKMSHrm-9Ba8kdgSZuD_0B2n_dcMYhZ-RGZtx9HBbA8bnYRROPD5bfCaNClxLEnNkDYFMH9NHm0DBJpWcG54KkVn7icDvw0DRyT-ZJQuM3S3GQ0xxZnum_SpzKM_jSQf-7sLPp6bb73kC9TK0ZIUR00Oa9en_rUqAAbVjcj-vodbGfTmPsOiZ7ZBAFGYuxJXabN8Y1wdPrBgi5SeXQDBfAZrfFItDz3JVlYo-cOEqmR2sclx1qZcZ3oNw4DluhJ7N09GmWACmuUQy-u4qM8uEqgu115MRYd-QSI0s0J242kbAIYNzoRK8COYy6oUDHe1h_WhUQVczAVpVtAjdwQyD-___5tiQgGY_a5I4kWrVO6228ZOqX_xJGM3GWXjXZxHxw-8AZvCI8RrLhDUdjJ9HYZvLa2-0ByX_5Q==&c=fx6eQmjlzBRH-nImhUjeGPZ8qU6u2Lx3pZs9Kv_0_RBP0QJRcKcz0A==&ch=-ZUzGDwy29O5aYNM2KMqdIkxM0XUoew67HC08ZDRrnuTjsxsqhAIIw==)**

President Trump said it best, "we are going to take back the House and we are going to reclaim the Senate." **But that isn 't possible without the patriots who sent President Trump to the White House, patriots like YOU!**

**Stand with President Trump at this crossroads to ensure we keep America First on the up and up & Democrats on the out and out!**

name: Steve Daines
subject: We must be resolute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
The radical Democrats continue to push their scheme to pack the U.S. Supreme Court. | [](http://links.action.supportstevedaines.com/u/click?_t=71faa67ca88f4c4b899697b6a4621901&_m=011326600f5f47e686156e14f9633e23&_e=eW6Qj6lo2eL3j7ejdAlGS5SV6-rZIl9KwBo94hZVLx7KAahhGaCT43l6cOAojXrw3itRfiZ4BymyPvB8pZGD2ZjLwYU-KAYhzLJj4RqrzIvvjAFT6cUbujYCIzzgDfEHw2rNPio9V2VVKBt-yt0FED1akt3GGnjbUX57-v35gkzQT9V0dNlvKFzD9qEVFuKEBTzp6YAvYQbw5cFCB-9C22o4tdTOJYehA7OMeg9YfxYbgj1VqwKXSw5RcKa4gudlBVxE3ROgZgA837ZYTgbHOpgfw5dr9hkZluplPkfDOrrB0h8DpNhr14a09DMTNxf8aLKmipMXgajpHa327CC_LGhQJFo1oI0FwD0JIvY-RpHKiXmZsI9GKkUl_5jyI8G4beFz1jiOwZU2aDPytjmAPqoT248RzpTt_OrkwC1T8l_BmK7Pr7bmUWs8qyT-5dbOWCfQj65iN96HDYHyvPSUD-uqT7vMB_CIlabqoy-YY08v-Mrx1AH56EvwpJF7MlvOykwfI69ymtvqv2PoebWoQw%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

With the radical Democrats continuing to push their scheme to pack the U.S. Supreme Court with four new additional leftist judges to implement their liberal agenda, it’s time to make our opposition to this disastrous idea official.

name: Giffords.org
subject: Every day we are getting breaking news about shootings. This can stop with your help.
body:
#

Friends,
This weekend, an active shooter killed three people and injured three others in Austin, TX. On Monday, three people were killed in Kenosha, WI. And yesterday, one person was killed and two were injured in West Hempstead, NY.
It seems as if every day, we are getting breaking national news about gun violence. But that's just the tip of the iceberg. Countless tragedies don't make the headlines, but their impact on families and communities is just as tragic.
Gun violence is preventable. No single policy can stop every shooting, but we know there are concrete solutions proven to save lives. So, we need to ask:
[**Can you make a $5 donation to Giffords PAC? We 'll take that contribution and put it right to work passing the lifesaving background checks legislation that is waiting in the Senate.**](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1b/2646166483/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210421-1-a")
If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:
| [Donate $10](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1c/2646166483/VEsHAQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em210421-1-a") | [Donate $25](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1f/2646166483/VEsHAA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210421-1-a")
---|---
[Donate $50](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1e/2646166483/VEsHAw/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210421-1-a") | [Donate $100](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade11/2646166483/VEsHAg/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210421-1-a")
---|---
[Donate $250](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade10/2646166483/VEsHDQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210421-1-a") | [Other amount](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1d/2646166483/VEsHDA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210421-1-a")
---|---
There doesn't have to be another day when we receive breaking news alerts about shootings. There doesn't have to be another day when families get the dreaded call that their loved one was a victim of gun violence.
And if we continue to work together, there doesn't have to be another day where we say background checks have not been signed into law.
Thank you for being part of this movement and helping us do the work to save lives.
Team Giffords
**[DONATE NOW](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade1b/2646166483/VEsEBQ/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMTA0MjEtMS1hIn0%3D/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-apr21?refcode=em210421-1-a")**
**_P.S. If you aren 't able to make a donation but would still like to get involved, you can text UNIVERSAL to 34131 to get connected with your senators today!_**

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://action.giffords.org/page/m/385ee15b/78fba3aa/63bfded9/50aade13/2646166483/VEsEBA/?g=VoprG3y8bT5gPy-pvV0V7pA "http://action.americansforresponsiblesolutions.org/page/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and Mark.

name: General Bergman
subject: Rashida Tlaib’s comments are disgraceful. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This kind of reckless rhetoric puts the safety of families in Michigan and across this country in jeopardy, and I will not stand for it.

****
Fellow Conservative,
**

CONDEMN RASHIDA TLAIB**

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)

This is Michigan Congressman Jack Bergman. Michigan Congresswoman and "Squad" member Rashida Tlaib has been loudly demanding the _**complete abolition of police and prisons.**_

This kind of reckless rhetoric puts the safety of families in Michigan and across this country in jeopardy, and I will not stand for it.**[If you are also fed up with elected officials bashing our brave law enforcement officers and pushing a radical socialist agenda, show your support by adding your name to our petition condemning Rashida Tlaib's comments.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)
**

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)

This statement is unbelievably irresponsible. Our police officers put their lives on the line to protect and serve our communities. And as a fellow Michigander, I know these do not reflect the values of our state's hardworking families. [**By adding your name, we can defend the rule of law and stand up for the brave men and women that protect our communities.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)

**CONDEMN RASHIDA TLAIB**

[**SIGN THE PETITION**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)

Instead of no more police and no more prisons, _**I am calling for no more radical socialists in Congress**_. Michigan leaders, including the Chief of Police in Detroit, are already saying they have had enough. **[Sign the petition today so we can condemn Rashida Tlaib and restore a conservative majority in the House.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==) **

Thank you,

Jack Bergman
Congressman, MI-01
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001R1bRn2jlnXvwYIvRZgicOtL8wFS_UQ3pHd3QFD8t9uSKF6xsXS_jzw0-bVTBUmVqXcO-fmhi-y7puvmK12NeZN6eM3wvlRDaF0FxplvT-7UY9PXOyo7sStzTsB-gheAwACxJdKVbvAV2meal7Ps04dCW-ezJtGu5s3IKaxEZTwkBYAlrbDHITe9pPiTdFcW8HMwumppomYXsQdeHZwHHMY2ns8WF8kv6X2hnsvAyD7fJ_6hm-VwF7LkMXDrLdRJ7y_hcAP5iMU71HcKZvslpC5gStbO12FRUte_T-STeczcd-aLETshMepKxNArZTARD2REopuyqW7r5f3jB6U5wJC5h0KwXO5-DTO0j6zKKVVITW9f5OX7xMqiLkJ6hwJQS9cfDMK1stPMdt7KytEiugAfB1VmMdgt8kuQHIfoEsa1BHDWDp0JO0eWBUI23aFZaO75F_eeMZp4=&c=eLMVDdI2jQByGt92YTqADtkPVciROgF3zb9l6wgUEtprpKAEnFQmLA==&ch=aNKnXJyQQil_hjoBE1rLfgP_opAR8LJ5TkeftjPuoHzGjwzDruktJA==)

**CONDEMN RASHIDA TLAIB**

body:
The future of the Supreme Court depends on this, %%First Name%% &zwnj

Friend ー did you know that Biden is on pace to issue _**218 Executive Orders**_ in year one of his presidency?

**That’s almost as many as President Trump issued over his entire 4 years in office!**

It seems like Joe Biden is following in the footsteps of his Democratic predecessor, Barack Obama, and governing by ‘phone and pen.’

clean_body: It seems like Joe Biden is following in the footsteps of his Democratic predecessor... | | Friend ー did you know that Biden is on pace to issue 218 Executive Orders in year one of his presidency? That’s almost as many as President Trump issued over his entire 4 years in office! It seems like Joe Biden is following in the footsteps of his Democratic predecessor, Barack Obama, and governing by ‘phone and pen.’ Our team has put together a list of Biden’s major executive orders, proclamations, and administrative actions and we want to get your thoughts on them. → Proclamation: Stopped Construction of Border Wall → Proclamation: Revoked Trump Proclamations that Aimed to Suspend the Entry of Immigrants during the Coronavirus Crisis → Executive Order: Revoked the Keystone XL Pipeline Permits → Executive Order: Rescinded President Trump’s Remain in Mexico Policy → Executive Order: Established the Presidential Commission on the Supreme Court of the United States Friend, Joe Biden said on the campaign trail that if someone governs mainly by executive action then they’re essentially “a dictator.” Well, based on his own words and his actions since being sworn into office, it seems that he is a self-proclaimed dictator. But we want to get your thoughts on all those executive actions that Biden is making. Thank you, Team LaHood | | | Paid for by LaHood for Congress | | P.O. Box 10735 Peoria, IL 61612 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: Did you see Governor Reynolds' email yesterday about Joe Biden's radical plan to bail out blue states like New York and California? == Friend, Did you see Governor Reynolds' email yesterday about Joe Biden's radical plan to bail out blue states like New York and California? Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer don't like that Iowa is leading the way and want to throw us a curveball by forcing us to foot the bill for their ridiculous tax hike... that is just not going to happen, Friend. Will you join Governor Reynolds in the fight against radical policies such as these? == == == == **== Thank you, Alerts via Team Reynolds \---BEGIN FORWARDING MESSAGE--- Friend, I have joined forces with 12 other Republican states to fight back against Joe Biden's tax hikes that he is using to BAIL OUT blue states. == Whether it be putting our kids back in the classroom, being the #1 state in opportunity, or having the 3rd lowest unemployment in the nation, it is no secret that Iowa is leading by example. Democrats in D.C. want to stunt the growth that Iowa has made recently by forcing us to pay to bail out blue states like New York, California, and Illinois. Even worse, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris are refusing to lead and take any effective action at our southern border, forcing states to help deal with this crisis! But I will continue to fight back against their radical policies and lack of leadership that is failing so many Americans. I refuse to let Washington, D.C. walk over us Friend. It is time to fight back against the radical left, tell Joe Biden that we will NOT bail out blue states and keep our state moving in the right direction. We can 't do all of this without you, Friend! == == == I hope that I can count on your continued support, Friend! Thank you, Governor Reynolds == Get involved with Team Reynolds Today! | What is the Born-Alive Abortion Survivors Protection- Act?

* It would provide full legal rights, as American citizens, to any baby that survives an attempted abortion
* These infants would be taken to a hospital where they would be cared for and receive medical attention
* Strict penalties will be imposed on anyone who does not abide by this law and provides immediate medical attention to the child

Now more than ever, our conservative movement must stand against the radical left and protect the lives of the unborn. It is critical we support babies that are born alive and provide them the medical attention they need.
I remain dedicated to helping Ann get this bill through Congress. [Will you join the fight to protect the next generation of Americans?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b6lMh10lq42qoYZuytrbX5j-N8bD8Pp5C5UV8SnOnRrMxT4gpyYayUyGtJ9e8xIXCSTVqfQN0RswDSNrTnHZWDO3Uzk8HMLc5-psHgIK9S0OVdRj9bcNsMutROamg3Tc8WKM4ZjGt7ay46hN40VZ1ARKRF7CalTi2jS2BBgs_RI=&c=rwA5UeNKPBA6gB-ndoXj-e1gtbZoyqTEtMozEMtowW6YYNv-5IbVPQ==&ch=YhXmWb6LWnPoUoRsPL1Pi7uPgNyEf1JwEQcbVRd_mtPSAVlE52VYig==&jrc=1)

name: Tiffany Shedd
subject: Not in my Arizona!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General
body:
friend, I’ll be honest: the first few months of the Biden-Harris Administration are worse than imagined. _President Biden ended construction on the border wall and rolled back President Trump’s strong policies to secure the border._ **In March alone, over 170,000 people attempted to cross the border.** We are witnessing a humanitarian crisis that needs to be addressed. Living on a drug and human trafficking route,**I see firsthand how these dangerous policies are leaving our southern border almost completely open, giving free reign to drug cartels and human traffickers. Not in our Arizona! **
**As Attorney General, I’ll work to STOP these progressive open border policies and hold the Biden-Harris Administration accountable.** Most importantly, I’ll always put Arizona First. If you agree, will you add your name to our **SECURE THE BORDER** petition right now? clean_body: friend, I’ll be honest: the first few months of the Biden-Harris Administration are worse than imagined. President Biden ended construction on the border wall and rolled back President Trump’s strong policies to secure the border. In March alone, over 170,000 people attempted to cross the border. We are witnessing a humanitarian crisis that needs to be addressed. Living on a drug and human trafficking route,I see firsthand how these dangerous policies are leaving our southern border almost completely open, giving free reign to drug cartels and human traffickers. Not in our Arizona! As Attorney General, I’ll work to STOP these progressive open border policies and hold the Biden-Harris Administration accountable. Most importantly, I’ll always put Arizona First. If you agree, will you add your name to our SECURE THE BORDER petition right now? It’s crucial that I know patriots like you, friend, who are willing to stand with me and SECURE THE BORDER. Add your name here >>>> . Thank you, Tiffany Shedd Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

Big Tech is censoring conservatives and important news critical of far-left organizations, while human smugglers aggressively use their platforms to exploit Joe Biden’s border crisis.

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: It’s time for a Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s up to all of us doing our part right now to ensure the successful adoption of the Green New Deal on the federal level.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210421-2017-header&t=1&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)
**Alexandria and Senator Ed Markey just reintroduced the Green New Deal resolution in Congress** — this time with 13 new co-sponsors and more than 12 companion bills that apply the GND principles of jobs, justice, and climate to everything from agriculture to electric vehicles.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8596?refcode=em20210421-2017&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)
Our momentum is strong, and it’s a testament to the organizing power we’ve built together as a movement over the last few years. We couldn’t have done this without you.
**Now, we need your help to continue building our momentum.** [Can you make a $3 contribution right now to help Alexandria keep up the fight for the Green New Deal and transformative policies like it?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8596?refcode=em20210421-2017&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8596?refcode=em20210421-2017&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)**
The Green New Deal would create millions of good-paying union jobs — all while repairing infrastructure, reducing pollution, and solving our intertwined economic, racial, and climate crises.
Now’s the time to take action and ensure the successful adoption of the Green New Deal on the federal level. [If you’re able, please make a contribution now to help Alexandria keep up the fight to build a cleaner, more sustainable future for all.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8596?refcode=em20210421-2017&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210421-2017-footer&t=24&refcode2=2017_2526796_sqtz--&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)
Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you'd like to update your contact information, **[click here](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--)**. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2017%2E2526796%2Esqtz--). To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
Email us: us@ocasiocortez.com

name: Erica Smith
subject: Imagine our shock when we saw...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2022 Campaign Committee
body:
Yesterday, I sent out an email after the Derek Chauvin verdict.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/M929EvJjhTQEnOH2fhaUnmaIOZ7qqAmTlwpivxkV6NU=?refcode=em20210421-1)
Yesterday, I sent out an email after the Derek Chauvin verdict. In the email, we explicitly acknowledged the millions of Black people who have been murdered in America.
**Unfortunately, we received a reply from someone who seriously tried to argue that slaves were "valuable property" and that by writing those words, I committed a "gross exaggeration."**
Look, our campaign receives racist replies to emails and tweets like this every day. **But imagine our shock when we saw that _this outrageously racist reply came from a member of the Democratic State Executive Committee!_**
[**_This is a prime example of institutional racism we 're up against here in North Carolina. Can you rush a donation of $10 more to help our insurgent campaign fight back against racist attacks like this? Our campaign has what it takes to move the party -- and North Carolina -- forward._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/M929EvJjhTQEnOH2fhaUnmaIOZ7qqAmTlwpivxkV6NU=?refcode=em20210421-1)
**[Donate»](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/M929EvJjhTQEnOH2fhaUnmaIOZ7qqAmTlwpivxkV6NU=?refcode=em20210421-1)**
---
**I am the descendant of slaves.** I grew up hearing stories from my great-grandfather, the child of slaves, about the Jim Crow South. I am the mother of Black sons. In my email last night, I am speaking my truth. I am speaking OUR truth.
Chattel slavery is responsible for the murder of millions upon millions of Black people in the history of our world. And that's not even counting Jim Crow, police killings, and all the other ways Black people have been "slaughtered" in our history. **Those are facts -- facts you can't dispute.**
Look at last night's email. Look at the murder of the 15-year-old Ma'Khia Bryant, who seeking safety and was killed by those sworn to protect her. Or the killing of Andrew Brown, in Elizabeth City, just a few counties from where I live. It's only been less than 48-hours since the Chauvin ruling, and it's as clear as ever that we have so much more work to do.
[**_If you 're with me, please consider donating $10 more to our insurgent campaign for progressive change right now. Our campaign has what it takes to move the party -- and North Carolina -- forward._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/M929EvJjhTQEnOH2fhaUnmaIOZ7qqAmTlwpivxkV6NU=?refcode=em20210421-1)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
**[Donate»](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/M929EvJjhTQEnOH2fhaUnmaIOZ7qqAmTlwpivxkV6NU=?refcode=em20210421-1)**
---

PO Box 1236
Gaston NC 27832 United States

If at any point you'd like to stop receiving emails from our campaign, you can unsubscribe here: [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/34CXR_0O697eWVcONmru-vXNgjqYflZJ19VwDZPKvQY=/FF0td5WFZGT5RfjgeMXyEcGoofgXapIcXZIeKt9RcAg=).

Peter,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just two months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

clean_body: They’re preparing to target Wisconsin. | Friend, Now that the Wisconsin’s governor’s race has been called a TOSS-UP, national Democrats are preparing to spend MILLIONS to try and keep Tony Evers in power. Evers will call up his partner in crime, Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer, who is now Vice Chair of the DNC to direct emergency funding to his campaign. That’s why I’ll need the help of grassroots conservatives like YOU to stop the influx of swamp money into Wisconsin. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Mon, Apr 19, 2021 Subject: New Status: TOSS-UP To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I have exciting news for you. The Governor’s race in Wisconsin has been declared a TOSS-UP in a new polling report. From Kenosha burning to the unemployment insurance debacle to a botched vaccine rollout, voters are fed up with Tony Evers’ failures and are starved for real leadership. After 30 of our supported conservative candidates won their races in Wisconsin, I believe we can turn the governor’s race from a toss-up to a Republican victory. But as always, victory will depend on grassroots leaders like you. I know how critical of a role you played when you fought by my side during my past campaigns. That’s why I’m turning to you again as we turn our eyes to the Governor’s Mansion to deliver a Republican victory next year. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

clean_body: Karl Rove is the latest RINO to attack me. | Peter, Karl Rove attacked President Trump after the President declared his new mission to “rebuild the GOP” next year. So it’s no surprise that Rove is now attacking me after I announced my campaign to bring President Trump’s agenda into the U.S. Senate next year. With the liberal swamp on both sides out to get me, I need grassroots conservatives like YOU to rush to my defense. I am running for the Senate to enact President Trump’s America First agenda -- the bold agenda that helped Republicans win Pennsylvania, Michigan, and Wisconsin for the first time since 1988. President Trump’s agenda is clearly the future of our Party... ...Meanwhile, Karl Rove is a ghost of the past GOP -- endless wars, open borders, and welfare for corporations who are now censoring your free speech and attacking election security. The 2022 elections are YOUR chance to decide who controls the Republican Party -- the same old folks like Karl Rove or grassroots conservatives like you who believe in putting America first. Let’s take back the reins of our Party and put pro-Trump conservatives back in charge. Thank you, Eric Greitens Navy SEAL Candidate for U.S. Senate (Missouri) Paid for by Greitens for U.S. Senate PO Box 989, Chesterfield, MO 63006 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: States Say ICE Stops Issuing Detainers for Illegal Immigrant Convicts, Revokes Them for Dozens
body:
Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has long complained about police in sanctuary cities that fail to honor its detainers, instead releasing serious criminals in the U.S. rather than turn them over to get deported.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | April 21, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22653&F=H&)
---
# [States Say ICE Stops Issuing Detainers for Illegal Immigrant Convicts, Revokes Them for Dozens](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22653&F=H&)
Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has long complained about police in sanctuary cities that fail to honor its detainers, instead releasing serious criminals in the U.S. rather than turn them over to get deported. Now two states are suing the Homeland Security agency for failing to issue detainer requests for convicted felons in the country illegally, forcing local authorities to free them after completing their sentence rather than turning them over to the feds for removal. It seems that the tables have turned under the Biden administration, according to the lawsuit, filed this month by officials in Texas and Louisiana.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22653&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---
### [Judicial Watch Slaps Maxine Waters with an Official Ethics Complaint ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22654&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctZXRoaWNzLWNvbXBsYWludC13YXRlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjEyMTQ4MTg=) Townhall “Ms. Waters took an oath to uphold and defend the Constitution of the United States, which includes the rights accorded to Officer Chauvin to a fair and impartial trial by a jury of his peers and to due process. Ms. Waters’ inflammatory comments that pressure the jury, while encouraging rioters already engaged in rampant destruction of property and attacks on police officers, to ‘get more confrontational’ are irresponsible and dangerous incitement by a Member of Congress,” Judicial Watch released in a statement Tuesday. “House Rule 23, Clause 1, of the Code of Official Conduct of the Rules of the House of Representatives states: ‘A Member, Delegate, Resident Commissioner, officer, or employee of the House shall conduct himself at all times in a manner that shall reflect creditably on the House.'” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22654&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvanctZXRoaWNzLWNvbXBsYWludC13YXRlcnMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjEyMTQ4MTg=)

### [Biden-Harris Administration to Ramp Up Experiments Using Aborted Baby Body Parts ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXhwZXJpbWVudHMtYWJvcnRlZC1iYWJpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjEyMTQ4MTg=) Breitbart The Biden-Harris administration’s Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) announced it is reversing the Trump administration’s decision to end taxpayer funding for experimental research that uses fetal tissue derived from aborted babies.

The National Institutes of Health (NIH), an agency under the authority of HHS, announced Friday an “Update on Changes to NIH Requirements Regarding Proposed Human Fetal Tissue Research” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22655&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZXhwZXJpbWVudHMtYWJvcnRlZC1iYWJpZXMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MjEyMTQ4MTg=)

### [Judicial Watch Files House Ethics Complaint against Maxine Waters over Incitement and Jury Intimidation ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53484&L=22656&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvanctcmVwLXdhdGVycy1pbmNpdGVtZW50Lz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNvcnJ1cHRpb24rY2hyb25pY2xlcyZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PTIwMjEwNDIxMjE0ODE4) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch today announced it filed a complaint with the chairman of the House Office of Congressional Ethics against Rep. clean_body: Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has long complained about police in sanctuary cities that fail to honor its detainers, instead releasing serious criminals in the U.S. rather than turn them over to get deported. | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 21, 2021 ---|---|--- | | == == Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) has long complained about police in sanctuary cities that fail to honor its detainers, instead releasing serious criminals in the U.S. rather than turn them over to get deported. Now two states are suing the Homeland Security agency for failing to issue detainer requests for convicted felons in the country illegally, forcing local authorities to free them after completing their sentence rather than turning them over to the feds for removal. It seems that the tables have turned under the Biden administration, according to the lawsuit, filed this month by officials in Texas and Louisiana. == | | | = Townhall “Ms. Waters took an oath to uphold and defend the Constitution of the United States, which includes the rights accorded to Officer Chauvin to a fair and impartial trial by a jury of his peers and to due process. Ms. Waters’ inflammatory comments that pressure the jury, while encouraging rioters already engaged in rampant destruction of property and attacks on police officers, to ‘get more confrontational’ are irresponsible and dangerous incitement by a Member of Congress,” Judicial Watch released in a statement Tuesday. “House Rule 23, Clause 1, of the Code of Official Conduct of the Rules of the House of Representatives states: ‘A Member, Delegate, Resident Commissioner, officer, or employee of the House shall conduct himself at all times in a manner that shall reflect creditably on the House.'” = = Breitbart The Biden-Harris administration’s Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) announced it is reversing the Trump administration’s decision to end taxpayer funding for experimental research that uses fetal tissue derived from aborted babies. The National Institutes of Health (NIH), an agency under the authority of HHS, announced Friday an “Update on Changes to NIH Requirements Regarding Proposed Human Fetal Tissue Research” = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch today announced it filed a complaint with the chairman of the House Office of Congressional Ethics against Rep. Maxine Waters (D-CA) for violating House ethics rules by encouraging violence and attempting to intimidate the jury in the trial of Derek Chauvin. The complaint argues that Rep. Maxine Waters encouraged violence by urging protestors to “get more confrontational” if Chauvin is found not guilty. | CLIPS = | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |

Under the new infrastructure plan, Democrats have hidden their outrageous plans.
* $175 billion – nearly 10% of the package – is dedicated to subsidizing electric vehicles.
* Another $100 billion is allocated to building new public schools to make school lunches "Greener."
* $50 billion is set aside for the National Science Foundation
* $200 billion is meant to green up and fix our power grid, the one that we just overloaded with the $174 billion in electric car subsidies.

The total spending on Green New Deal style waste could end up being nearly half of the so-called “infrastructure” bill. It’s ridiculous, friend. We deserve better than a Green New Deal in disguise! clean_body: Happy Earth Day! Here’s how the Democrats are using the environment to push socialism HAPPY EARTH DAY: THE GREEN NEW DEAL IS BACK! Friend, just ahead of earth day, Democrats made a huge policy push in the name of the environment. They’re bringing back the "Green New Deal," which remains firmly planted on the brains and wish lists of socialists in the House and Senate, despite both Congress and voters rejecting the bill. Under the new infrastructure plan, Democrats have hidden their outrageous plans. $175 billion – nearly 10% of the package – is dedicated to subsidizing electric vehicles. Another $100 billion is allocated to building new public schools to make school lunches "Greener." $50 billion is set aside for the National Science Foundation $200 billion is meant to green up and fix our power grid, the one that we just overloaded with the $174 billion in electric car subsidies. The total spending on Green New Deal style waste could end up being nearly half of the so-called “infrastructure” bill. It’s ridiculous, friend. We deserve better than a Green New Deal in disguise! Will you chip in now to help me say NO to the socialist nightmare? Put simply: the infrastructure bill is nothing but a big excuse to increase spending and raise your taxes. In the middle of a pandemic! And these Democrats are not going to give this up unless we make them. They’re not going to stop unless enough people with sense and courage stand up and say, "No." That’s what I’m doing in Washington now. And I hope you’ll join my efforts by chipping in today: Let's get to work on the real solutions. Nancy Mace | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress | | 295 Seven Farms Drive C-186 Charleston, SC 29492 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

Peter,
Last night, Josh was on Fox News to talk about the growing anger against hypocritical mega-corporations and their increasing influence in the lives of everyday Americans.

Each passing day it becomes more clear that these woke, mega-corporations want to run our government.

_**Watch the interview below**_
[](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=04b4002497a34d58baa223383d9162c1&_e=ccclW-5OexoxJVUaoioEsbKw3hoznPyjargvuIgHjSypMXyTzB-9qAnHb5MBkhN7fqh07FNBFnLvLbZKt19Nlm_KX5vU45OoRImtuawNpZS2YLxSdoaeprBsCoqHdnRUhXvjDmG9GAv4JpNrUM9C7P63QkjkBQoBIXyGvkp6AIDC6dWv3iW-2w6mlNXvRQw2GoonvLRvYfcgKebp-gyS9LB7mhUbLh9QsJ74QaJn3nCU58AKrnFBldUKejR-IWJR75omw1MH35GESPWi5LoZRA-miRATyOhj4Dm1kRaJ6MS5ptOTMvSvR4ljgHJr9eBv-4nbCivPiuA9H2Dsaa0TS1tKjiSSwi1wUndh9TaBdH-xmt0nJFqgjyWAx7lk-_wNgWkRMYSS03KJeePXPOP0aQ%3D%3D)
